Name: Average time from SW-Reviewer Agreed to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Total time between SW-Reviewer Agreed and SW-Awaiting EIC Decision
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Minimum time it takes SW-Awaiting EIC Decision to be reached after SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Average duration of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision across all process variants
Metric: The average of the duration between activity SW-Awaiting EIC Decision and the end of the case

Name: Total resolution time of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision when preceded by SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Time elapsed from SW-AE Recommendation overdue to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Recommendation overdue' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Average time from SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Minimum time between SW-Reviewer Agreed and SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in variants that include multiple revision cycles
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Total time spent in SW-Awaiting EIC Decision compared to SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Average time from the last SW-Reviewer Agreed event to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in multi-reviewer cases
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Elapsed time between SW-EIC Major Revision and the subsequent occurrence of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in resubmission variants
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-EIC Major Revision' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Average cycle time of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision following a major revision versus a minor revision path
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-EIC Major Revision' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Total time from SW-Reviewer Selection is now due to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in complex reviewer assignment variants
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is now due' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Minimum time from SW-Checklist Completed to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in direct rejection variants
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Time between the final SW-Reviewer Agreed and SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in variants ending with SW-EIC Accept
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'
